CustomField.description: Indicate whether an Ownership Waiver is being applied for this income certification. To be eligible, the applicant must have a firm mortgage commitment and complete a Homebuyer Education course before closing.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Indicate whether an Ownership Waiver is being applied for this income certification. To be eligible, the applicant must have a firm mortgage commitment and complete a Homebuyer Education course before closing.
CustomField.label: Ownership Waiver?
